## Description

Brief description of the resource being added/updated.


## Type of Resource

- [ ] Component
- [ ] Snippet
- [ ] Template


## Checklist

- [ ] **Metadata completed** - `metadata.yml` has all required fields filled
- [ ] **Clean dummy app** - `test/dummy/` is in clean state (run `bin/clean`)
- [ ] **Complete template.rb** - generated template runs without errors; run `bin/apply`
- [ ] **No dev artifacts** - no tmp/, log/, or other development files included


## Testing

Confirm the resource works by running:
```bash
bin/clean
bin/apply [resource-path]
```
